meta.description: PrivacyWatch — LLM data privacy, retention, and model training tracker

providers.name: OpenAI

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: No training on API data since March 1, 2023. Opt-in available if customer explicitly requests.

retention.label: 30 days
retention.detail: API inputs/outputs auto-deleted after 30 days. Application state retention varies by endpoint.

zdr.label: Yes — approval required
zdr.detail: ZDR requires OpenAI approval + written amendment + 10% price uplift. EU data residency requires ZDR amendment.

location.label: US + EU option
location.detail: US primary. EU residency (Ireland + others) available with ZDR amendment and approval.

providers.notes: API has been training-off by default since March 2023. Primary ToS via OpenRouter; API-specific data policy at platform.openai.com/docs/guides/your-data.

providers.name: OpenAI

training.label: On by default
training.detail: Free, Plus, Pro: training ON by default. Opt-out: Settings → Data Controls → toggle off. Business/Enterprise/Edu: OFF by default.

retention.label: 30 days after deletion
retention.detail: Deleted chats removed within 30 days. Temporary Chats auto-deleted in 30 days, never used for training.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: ZDR not available on any consumer plan. Enterprise tier only (approval required).

location.label: US primary
location.detail: US + globally via trusted service providers. EU residency not available for consumer plans.

providers.notes: Paying for Plus or Pro does NOT disable training by default.

providers.name: Anthropic

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: No training on commercial API data. Opt-in via feedback submission only. 'By default, we will not use your inputs or outputs to train our models.'

retention.label: 30 days auto-delete
retention.detail: Inputs/outputs auto-deleted within 30 days. ZDR = immediate post-response. Policy violations: up to 2 years.

zdr.label: Yes — enterprise approval
zdr.detail: ZDR available for enterprise API customers. Requires Anthropic account team + per-org enablement. Eligible: Messages API, Token Counting, Prompt Caching. Not eligible: Batch, Files API.

location.label: US only
location.detail: Workspace geo: US only. EU residency available via AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex, or Azure Foundry — those providers' policies apply.

providers.notes: If using Claude via AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex, or Azure — Anthropic's policy does not govern; cloud provider's policies apply. Commercial ToS via OpenRouter; API data retention at platform.claude.com.

providers.name: Anthropic

training.label: Opt-in required
training.detail: Training OFF by default. User must explicitly enable 'Model Improvement' toggle in Privacy Settings — the only US Frontier consumer product with opt-IN training.

retention.label: 30 days after deletion
retention.detail: Backend storage cleared within 30 days after user deletes. If training opted in: de-identified data up to 5 years. Incognito chats: 30 days regardless, never trained.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: ZDR not available for Claude.ai Free/Pro/Max. Incognito mode is available (auto-deleted 30 days, never trained on).

location.label: US only
location.detail: No geographic controls for consumer plans.

providers.notes: Only US Frontier consumer product where training is opt-IN, not opt-out. Incognito mode is a genuine privacy feature.

providers.name: Google Gemini

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: Paid API/Vertex AI: data NOT used for training. Governed by Cloud Data Processing Addendum; Google acts as data processor.

retention.label: Limited period (unspecified)
retention.detail: Abuse monitoring: 'limited period' — duration deliberately not specified. Grounding (Search/Maps): mandatory 30-day retention even under ZDR.

zdr.label: Yes — Vertex AI
zdr.detail: ZDR equivalent available. Caveat: grounding with Google Search/Maps retains data for 30 days mandatory — true zero retention not achievable when grounding is used.

location.label: US + EU residency
location.detail: Vertex AI offers EU data residency for enterprise. Regional Google Cloud options available.

providers.notes: 'Limited period' retention is deliberately vague. Grounding creates a ZDR exception. Google Cloud ToS via OpenRouter; Vertex AI data governance at cloud.google.com/vertex-ai.

providers.name: Google Gemini

training.label: On by default
training.detail: Free Gemini App and AI Studio: training ON. Used to improve Google products and ML technologies. Paying for Gemini Advanced does NOT change this — same policy as free.

retention.label: Until deleted; 3yr post-review
retention.detail: Until user deletes. Human-reviewed data retained 3 years post-anonymization.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: ZDR not available on Gemini App or free AI Studio.

location.label: US
location.detail: No location controls for Gemini App or free AI Studio.

providers.notes: Critical: paying for Gemini Advanced does NOT improve privacy. Training is on by default regardless of subscription tier. Opt-out via 'Gemini Apps Activity' toggle — but disabling it also removes chat history. Source updated from 404 URL to Gemini Apps Privacy Hub (last updated May 19, 2026).

providers.name: xAI / Grok

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: 'We do not use your business data, including inputs or outputs, for training our models.' Opt-in available (free credits in exchange).

retention.label: 30 days auto-delete
retention.detail: API inputs/outputs auto-deleted within 30 days. Exceptions: written agreement or policy violations/legal compliance.

zdr.label: Yes — ZDR-Enabled API
zdr.detail: May 12, 2026 Enterprise ToS formally names this the 'ZDR-Enabled API.' User Content exists transiently only; deleted upon the earlier of: (a) one hour after inference completion, or (b) delivery of the response. No logs, backups, or durable copies retained for any purpose, including safety or legal compliance. Personal Data must be submitted exclusively through the ZDR-Enabled API. Foundation model training explicitly prohibited: 'xAI shall not use any User Content to train any foundation models, large language models, or other artificial intelligence systems.'

location.label: US only
location.detail: All xAI services processed in the United States. No EU data residency.

providers.notes: Updated May 12, 2026: xAI Enterprise ToS now formally names the product 'ZDR-Enabled API' — superseding the prior 'Enterprise Vault' label. ZDR deletion: within 1 hour of inference completion or response delivery, whichever is sooner. Training prohibition explicitly stated in ToS. Enterprise ToS via OpenRouter; FAQ at x.ai/legal/faq.

providers.name: xAI / Grok

training.label: On by default
training.detail: Grok.com/mobile: conversations used for training by default. Grok on X: X Corp shares public posts + Grok interactions with xAI for training. Opt-out available in both.

retention.label: Indefinite until deleted
retention.detail: Grok.com: conversations kept until deleted; 30-day recovery window. Grok on X: governed by X Corp policy — duration not confirmed.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR for consumer surfaces.

location.label: US only
location.detail: xAI: all processing in US. Grok on X governed by X Corp (separate legal entity).

providers.notes: Grok on X.com is governed by X Corp's privacy policy, NOT xAI's — legally separate entities. Opt-out is forward-looking only.

providers.name: Alibaba / Qwen

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: 'Qwen Cloud does not use your API inputs or outputs to train or improve models.' Training data sourced from public data, partners, synthetic data only.

retention.label: ZDR baseline; 7-day (Responses API)
retention.detail: Standard inference: memory-only, not persisted post-response. Responses API: 7-day conversation storage. Metadata (billing): duration unspecified. CRITICAL: Model Studio assistant API retains conversation history with NO expiration date — materially different product.

zdr.label: Yes — built-in baseline
zdr.detail: ZDR documented as baseline on Qwen Cloud. Separate regional endpoints: CN/SG/US/EU. Responses API 7-day retention is an exception.

location.label: Multi-region (Frankfurt = genuine EU)
location.detail: Separate endpoints: China (Beijing), Singapore, US (Virginia), EU (Frankfurt), Hong Kong. Frankfurt endpoint uses ONLY Frankfurt computing resources — genuine EU data residency with German BSI C5 + AIC4 certifications. Data stays in selected region. CAVEAT (May 29, 2026 Product ToS): Alibaba Cloud's overarching Product Terms for Model Studio use generic language — 'transferred to, stored, and processed in the country where Alibaba Cloud, its affiliates, or its sub-contractors maintain facilities' — with no specific regional binding. Specific endpoint guarantees are in Qwen Cloud ZDR docs only.

providers.notes: Strongest Chinese provider on data governance. Frankfurt is genuine EU residency (not just routing). GDPR compliance via EU Standard Contractual Clauses (Implementing Decision 2021/914/EU) + UK Addendum. China-based subprocessors in transfer chain: iSoftStone, Beyondsoft, Hangzhou Xutian Technology, Accenture Enterprise Cloud Hangzhou. Model Studio assistant has indefinite retention — avoid for sensitive data. NOTE (May 29, 2026 Product ToS): Overarching Alibaba Cloud Product Terms for Model Studio use generic location language with no specific regional binding; specific endpoint guarantees are in Qwen Cloud ZDR documentation. Alibaba Cloud Product ToS via OpenRouter; ZDR docs at docs.qwencloud.com.

providers.name: Moonshot AI / Kimi

training.label: On by default — CRITICAL
training.detail: Privacy Policy Section 2 (April 30, 2025): 'We process this information to provide and improve the Services, including training and optimizing our models.' NO legally operative document (Privacy Policy, ToS, DPA, Model Use Agreement) explicitly carves out API data from this training clause. FAQ claim of 'no training' is NOT referenced in any legal document and has no contractual force.

retention.label: Vague — 'as necessary'
retention.detail: No specific duration. 'As long as necessary to provide services and legitimate business purposes.' Post-account-deletion: transaction/billing records may be retained indefinitely for tax/fraud/legal.

zdr.label: Via 3rd party only (limited models)
zdr.detail: ZDR via Vercel AI Gateway for K2.6 and Thinking Turbo ONLY — NOT for K2 Instruct. Not available directly from Moonshot platform.

location.label: Singapore entity; Beijing parent
location.detail: Corporate entity: Moonshot AI PTE. LTD. (Singapore). Parent: Beijing (北京月之暗面). Chinese-language policy states data stored within PRC for domestic users.

providers.notes: CRITICAL: Privacy Policy governs. API data CAN be used for training under current legal documentation. FAQ claim is not legally operative. English policy omits PIPL; Chinese policy includes cross-border consent requirements. OpenRouter lists Moonshot as 'zero retention, does not train' — reflects routing contract, contradicts Privacy Policy. Model Use Agreement via OpenRouter; Privacy Policy at platform.kimi.ai.

providers.name: Moonshot AI / Kimi

training.label: On by default
training.detail: Policy: 'We process this information to...training and optimizing our models.' Opt-out via email to membership@moonshot.ai only — no in-app toggle documented.

retention.label: Vague — 'as necessary'
retention.detail: No specific duration.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR for consumer app.

location.label: Singapore entity; Beijing parent
location.detail: Singapore entity for international. PRC storage confirmed for domestic users in Chinese-language policy.

providers.notes: Opt-out is email-only with no documented technical implementation.

providers.name: Zhipu AI / GLM

training.label: On by default
training.detail: BigModel API: data used for service improvement by default. No public opt-out mechanism. Separate agreement required to restrict use.

retention.label: 30-day (batch); vague (general)
retention.detail: Batch API files: 30-day auto-delete. General API data: 'minimum necessary period' — no specific number.

zdr.label: None documented
zdr.detail: No ZDR option found for BigModel API.

location.label: China only
location.detail: Policy: all data stored within PRC. No cross-border transfer currently. English policy not published — Chinese only.

providers.notes: Privacy policy available in Chinese only. No public DPA. International users should use Z.ai (Singapore entity) instead.

providers.name: Zhipu AI / GLM

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: Z.ai API (Singapore entity): 'We will not use your User Content for developing or improving Services unless you explicitly agree.' Privacy Policy (Sept 29, 2025) explicitly states: 'The Company do not store any of the content the Customer or its End Users provide or generate while using our Services...processed in real-time...not saved on our servers.' API users governed by DPA, not consumer policy.

retention.label: Real-time only (no storage)
retention.detail: DPA embedded in Privacy Policy: no storage of API content. Processed in real-time, not saved on servers. Functionally equivalent to ZDR with legal backing. Consumer policy: 'minimum necessary period' — different (and weaker) commitment.

zdr.label: Yes — legally operative
zdr.detail: DPA explicitly confirms real-time processing with no storage. This is a legally operative commitment (embedded in Privacy Policy, Additional Terms for API Services prevail in conflict). Not marketed as 'ZDR' but functionally and legally equivalent.

location.label: Singapore
location.detail: Z.ai: JINGSHENG HENGXING TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD., Singapore. Data processed in Singapore. Separate from BigModel China entity.

providers.notes: STRONG UPDATE: DPA in Privacy Policy explicitly states 'no storage of API content' — legally operative. API and consumer explicitly separated. Consumer policy is weaker. BigModel China has perpetual licence clause — different entity, same underlying models. ToS via OpenRouter; Privacy Policy at docs.z.ai.

providers.name: MiniMax

training.label: Ambiguous — profiling only excluded
training.detail: Privacy Policy (March 30, 2026): 'We do not use your input personal data to infer characteristics about an individual, nor use personal data for training to profile or target consumers.' This ONLY prohibits training for PROFILING/TARGETING. Completely SILENT on whether inference data can be used for general model improvement. No other document in 6 retrieved addresses this. Service Rules (governing privacy/security) require platform login to access.

retention.label: Vague (general); specific for audio/voice
retention.detail: General inference data: 'as long as necessary / as soon as reasonable' — still vague. ONLY specific durations found: audio generation URLs expire in 9 hours; temporary voice assets valid for 7 days maximum.

zdr.label: Undocumented officially
zdr.detail: No formal ZDR offering documented in any of 6 retrieved documents. Third-party review (Oct 2025) confirms zero-retention mode for MiniMax M2, but not in official policy.

location.label: Undisclosed (inferred US)
location.detail: Privacy Policy does not specify server locations. EU-US Privacy Framework certification implies US data center for international API, but not explicitly stated. China domestic apps: stored in PRC.

providers.notes: Nanonoble Pte. Ltd. (Singapore entity) for international API. Training policy gap confirmed across 6 retrieved documents — only profiling/targeting excluded, general improvement not addressed. Service Rules inaccessible without login. SOC 2 / ISO potentially available under NDA for enterprise. ToS via OpenRouter; Privacy Policy at platform.minimax.io.

providers.name: MiniMax

training.label: Vague 'service improvement'
training.detail: Consumer prompts 'may be retained for service improvement, anonymized where possible.' No explicit prohibition on training use.

retention.label: 30 days post-deletion
retention.detail: Active accounts: indefinite. Deletion: cleared within 30 days. Facial data (video): permanently deleted on completion.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR for consumer product.

location.label: China (domestic apps)
location.detail: Chinese consumer apps stored within PRC per PIPL compliance.

providers.notes: Facial data explicitly non-retained post-generation — a positive specific commitment.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.incidentDetail: Jan 2025: ClickHouse DB breach exposing 1M+ records (chat logs, API keys). Korea PIPC (Apr 2025): unauthorized data transfers to ByteDance-affiliated entity. Italy Garante: ongoing GDPR investigation. Gov bans: NASA, DoD, Congress (US), Australia, Italy, Taiwan.

training.label: On by default; API opt-out not documented
training.detail: ToS Section 4.3 (March 27, 2026): 'we may use Inputs and Outputs to provide, maintain, operate, develop or improve the Services.' Consumer product has opt-out toggle ('Improve the model for everyone'). NO equivalent opt-out is documented for API tier.

retention.label: Indefinite (post-deletion rights reserved)
retention.detail: ToS Section 2.5: 'Retain certain data as required by laws and regulations' — indefinite. Shared conversation links may be crawled despite anti-scraping measures — risk 'cannot be entirely eliminated.'

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR tier or enterprise agreement. Alternatives: self-host open weights (MIT license), or use Google Cloud / Azure hosting (their policies apply).

location.label: China — all users
location.detail: ToS Section 10.1: Governed by People's Republic of China law. Policy (explicit): 'we directly collect, process and store your Personal Data in People's Republic of China.' All global users — no separate international infrastructure.

providers.notes: Updated to official March 27, 2026 ToS. Korea PIPC investigation concluded November 2025 with minor remediations (Korean-language policy added, Volcano/ByteDance transfers blocked, opt-out toggle added). Core China storage and training policy unchanged. Italy Garante ban still in force. No DPA, no SOC 2, no enterprise ZDR as of May 2026. Open-source weights (MIT license) self-hosted removes all these concerns.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.incidentDetail: See API row — same incidents apply.

training.label: On by default
training.detail: Policy: 'We may use your Personal Data to...train and improve our technology, such as our machine learning models.' Opt-out toggle available in account settings.

retention.label: Indefinite (account active)
retention.detail: Retained for duration of account existence. ToS violations may extend indefinitely.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR option.

location.label: China — all users
location.detail: Explicit China storage for all global users.

providers.notes: Not appropriate for sensitive or regulated data. Mobile app had hardcoded encryption keys and unencrypted data transmission (NowSecure, 2025).

providers.name: Xiaomi MiMo

training.label: Not stated (OpenRouter: no training)
training.detail: Service Agreement does not explicitly address training. OpenRouter lists MiMo as 'Does not train.' Privacy Policy at privacy.mi.com/XiaomiMiMoPlatform/en_GB/ was inaccessible (504 timeout) — needs manual verification.

retention.label: Reasonable period
retention.detail: Service Agreement: 'permanently delete personal information within a reasonable period' upon service expiration or user request. No specific timeframe.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: Confirmed absent by Vercel AI Gateway: 'Zero Data Retention is not currently available for this model.'

location.label: EU + Singapore (international)
location.detail: CRITICAL UPDATE: Service Agreement explicitly states international user data is stored on servers in Europe and Singapore — NOT mainland China. User is Data Controller, Xiaomi is Data Processor. Domestic China users: data in PRC.

providers.notes: Upgraded from Unverified based on Service Agreement (April 26, 2026). Major finding: international data goes to EU/Singapore, not China. Privacy Policy still inaccessible — training policy needs confirmation. Open-source weights on HuggingFace (MIT) available for self-hosting. User Agreement via OpenRouter (anchor removed for compatibility).

providers.name: Fireworks AI

training.label: Off — ZDR default
training.detail: No training on inference data. FireOptimizer (optional) requires explicit opt-in; deleted after use, contractually enforced.

retention.label: ZDR default; Response API 30-day*
retention.detail: Standard inference: ZDR default (volatile memory only). IMPORTANT: Response API defaults to store=True (30-day retention) — set store=False to disable.

zdr.label: Default — all tiers
zdr.detail: ZDR is the default for all tiers. Not an add-on. Enterprise explicitly guarantees no data retention.

location.label: US + EU + APAC
location.detail: Dedicated deployments: US, EUROPE, APAC, or GLOBAL region options.

providers.notes: ISO 27001/27701/42001, SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA. *Response API has store=True as default — must explicitly set store=False. ToS via OpenRouter; Data handling at docs.fireworks.ai.

providers.name: Together AI

training.label: Off — opt-in only
training.detail: 'We do not use any data collected from you to train our models without your explicit opt-in and consent.' Toggle in account Privacy & Security settings.

retention.label: Not stored by default
retention.detail: No default storage of prompts/completions. ZDR self-serve. Temporary cache duration unspecified.

zdr.label: Yes — self-serve, all tiers
zdr.detail: ZDR available via Settings → Profile → Privacy & Security. Most accessible ZDR of any inference provider — no sales call required.

location.label: US + EU (enterprise)
location.detail: Default: North America. EU data residency for enterprise (UK, Spain, France, Portugal, Iceland). SCCs in place for GDPR.

providers.notes: SOC 2 Type II (Jul 2025). DPA for enterprise only. HIPAA BAA available. ToS via OpenRouter; Privacy at www.together.ai/privacy.

providers.name: DeepInfra

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: 'We do not train on your data.' Memory-only processing. Exception: Google/Anthropic models follow those providers' own policies when accessed via DeepInfra.

retention.label: Memory only (not to disk)
retention.detail: Standard inference: in-memory, not stored to disk. Account data: 30-day post-deletion. Bulk APIs: temporary encrypted disk during processing.

zdr.label: Yes — enterprise only
zdr.detail: ZDR available via enterprise arrangement. Not self-serve. Trust Center has formal Data Retention Policy document.

location.label: US only
location.detail: US data centers only. No EU data residency. GDPR DPA: in progress — not yet published.

providers.notes: Google/Anthropic model calls follow those providers' policies, not DeepInfra's. GDPR DPA absent — gap for EU enterprise. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA compliant. Terms via OpenRouter; Data privacy at docs.deepinfra.com.

providers.name: Nebius AI

training.label: Speculative decoding only
training.detail: Training ON by default — but ONLY to train small internal draft models for Speculative Decoding (inference speed optimization). Explicitly NOT for foundational LLM training. ZDR disables entirely.

retention.label: Retained for Speculative Decoding
retention.detail: Duration: 'as long as necessary' — not numerically specified. Object Storage: deleted within 4 days of deletion request. Security logs: 24 months.

zdr.label: Yes — onboarding form or email
zdr.detail: ZDR available via onboarding form or by emailing tokenfactory-support@nebius.com — not a self-serve UI toggle. Disables Speculative Decoding data collection. Required for HIPAA/BAA compliance. May impact inference latency.

location.label: EU (Finland) + US
location.detail: Token Factory: EU-North1 (Finland) primary. Both EU and US inference available. Nebius B.V. incorporated Netherlands.

providers.notes: Ex-Yandex: full divestment completed July 2024. Fully independent EU entity now. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001:2022. DPA published. ToS via OpenRouter; Token Factory quick guide at docs.tokenfactory.nebius.com.

providers.name: SiliconFlow

training.label: Not explicitly prohibited
training.detail: Terms of Service (Mar 31, 2025): 'We will not access your Interaction Data...will not use or disclose it without authorization...will only use your Interaction Data in compliance with applicable laws and solely for the purpose of providing Services to you.' This constrains use to service provision but contains no explicit training prohibition. CN Privacy Policy (.cn entity): 'we will not conduct any unauthorised use or disclosure of your Interaction Data, and will not store it' — functionally stronger but applies to Chinese entity/users.

retention.label: No storage (Interaction Data only)
retention.detail: Chinese-language Privacy Policy (Oct 11, 2025): Interaction Data is not stored. Account data, billing, and profile data IS retained with no specific durations. 'No data stored, ever' marketing is misleading as a blanket claim — it applies to Interaction Data specifically.

zdr.label: Not formally documented
zdr.detail: No formal ZDR offering found. 'No storage' claim for Interaction Data is functionally equivalent but not contractually guaranteed as a ZDR service.

location.label: Undisclosed
location.detail: Server locations NOT specified in any policy version. Singapore entity governed by PDPA; China entity by Chinese law. International .com product explicitly excludes China users — separate siliconflow.cn product.

providers.notes: Source updated to English Terms of Service (Mar 31, 2025), which explicitly restricts Interaction Data use: 'will not access your Interaction Data...will not use or disclose it without authorization...solely for the purpose of providing Services to you.' CN Privacy Policy (.cn entity, Oct 2025) has stronger language: 'will not conduct any unauthorised use or disclosure of your Interaction Data, and will not store it.' No explicit training prohibition in any version — constraint is 'solely for purpose of providing Services.' No SOC 2, ISO 27001, DPA, or sub-processor list.

providers.name: Cursor

training.label: Off — contractual ZDR
training.detail: Privacy Mode: contractual ZDR with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Vertex, xAI. Cursor's own models also excluded. ToS: 'ANYSPHERE WILL NOT USE CONTENT TO TRAIN... UNLESS YOU'VE EXPLICITLY AGREED.'

retention.label: No persistent storage
retention.detail: Plaintext code not retained. Embeddings metadata (hashes, filenames) retained for codebase indexing feature. Volatile memory for AI requests.

zdr.label: Yes — Privacy Mode = functional ZDR
zdr.detail: Privacy Mode provides ZDR-equivalent guarantees via contracts with all model providers. Default for Teams/Enterprise (admin-enforced).

location.label: US only
location.detail: All processing on US AWS infrastructure. No EU data residency on any plan.

providers.notes: Default for Teams/Enterprise. SOC 2 Type II. HIPAA BAA and DPA available for enterprise only.

providers.name: Cursor

training.label: On (default Free/Pro)
training.detail: Without Privacy Mode: code, prompts, editor actions may be stored and used 'to improve our AI features and train our models.' Must manually enable Privacy Mode to stop.

retention.label: Variable — code may be stored
retention.detail: Code and context may be stored without Privacy Mode. Codebase indexing: embeddings and file metadata retained.

zdr.label: Not active
zdr.detail: Privacy Mode must be manually enabled: Settings → General (Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+J). Free and Pro users start with it OFF.

location.label: US only
location.detail: US AWS only.

providers.notes: Critical: most Free/Pro users have Privacy Mode OFF without knowing it. This is the default state for the majority of individual Cursor users.

providers.name: OpenCode

training.label: Off — zero-retention
training.detail: Go tier: zero-retention policy from providers. No training on user data.

retention.label: Zero-retention
retention.detail: Go tier providers use zero-retention. Open-source self-hosted: user controls all data entirely.

zdr.label: Yes (Go tier)
zdr.detail: Go subscription ($10/month) provides zero-retention model access.

location.label: US, EU, Singapore
location.detail: Go models in US, EU, and Singapore. Note: some models may be proxied through 3rd-party APIs (Alibaba DashScope, Moonshot) — ZDR scope for proxied calls undocumented.

providers.notes: Infrastructure may proxy through Alibaba/Moonshot — ZDR scope for those calls unclear.

providers.name: OpenCode

training.label: Possible (ToS clause)
training.detail: ToS: 'if you are using the Services through an unpaid account, we may use Content to further develop and improve our Services.' No explicit training prohibition.

retention.label: Stored server-side; no opt-out
retention.detail: Full prompts/responses stored in Cloudflare R2. No documented retention period. No user-facing opt-out. Contradicts homepage marketing claim.

zdr.label: Not available
zdr.detail: No ZDR for free Zen tier. Use Go tier or own API keys to avoid server-side storage.

location.label: Cloudflare R2 (region unknown)
location.detail: Storage location not explicitly stated.

providers.notes: Homepage states 'does not store code' — contradicted by free tier ToS and documented storage.

providers.name: HyperAgent

training.label: Off — express consent required
training.detail: 'We will not use, or permit others to use, Input or Output to train the generative artificial intelligence models used to provide the Services, without your express consent.'

retention.label: Not specified; 30-day floor via subprocessors
retention.detail: HyperAgent own retention: 'no longer than necessary.' Subprocessors (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI) may retain I/O up to 30 days for safety/compliance.

zdr.label: Not documented
zdr.detail: No ZDR option explicitly documented. Effective floor is 30-day subprocessor retention.

location.label: Global (unspecified)
location.detail: Data may be transferred outside user's jurisdiction. EU/UK/Swiss: SCCs or adequacy decisions. Specific data centers not disclosed.

providers.notes: No compliance certifications disclosed. Security page returns 404. Strong no-training commitment. Metadata (usage data) used for analytics/product improvement.

providers.name: Crof AI

training.label: Never collected
training.detail: 'We do NOT use your data for training AI models.' Prompts/completions never stored — real-time processing only.

retention.label: Never stored
retention.detail: Real-time processing only, never persisted. Account data removed within 30 days of deletion. Usage metrics: 7 years (billing only).

zdr.label: De facto (no collection)
zdr.detail: ZDR by design — data never collected. Strongest guarantee without requiring a formal ZDR agreement.

location.label: US
location.detail: Data processed in the United States.

providers.notes: Clearest, most explicit privacy policy in this entire research. CCPA compliant.

providers.name: Wafer AI

training.label: Off (ZDR tier)
training.detail: No training on served models or internal speculative decoding draft models. Zero Data Retention fully active.

retention.label: No durable storage
retention.detail: Prompts/completions NOT written to durable storage. Operational metadata only (token counts, timestamps, request IDs).

zdr.label: Yes — Privacy tier
zdr.detail: Wafer Pass Privacy ($25/week): Zero Data Retention explicitly documented. DPA available.

location.label: US
location.detail: Inference served from US data centers.

providers.notes: Y Combinator-backed. DPA available. GDPR rights acknowledged. Policy updated May 4, 2026. Terms via OpenRouter; Privacy Policy at www.wafer.ai/privacy-policy.

providers.name: Wafer AI

training.label: Speculative decoding only
training.detail: Standard tiers: may use prompts/completions to train small internal draft models for Speculative Decoding only. NOT used to train served open-source models. ZDR (Privacy tier) disables this.

retention.label: 30 days (anonymized)
retention.detail: Prompts/completions stored in anonymized form for up to 30 days for abuse detection, then deleted.

zdr.label: Available (upgrade to Privacy)
zdr.detail: ZDR available by upgrading to Wafer Pass Privacy ($25/week).

location.label: US
location.detail: US data centers.

providers.notes: Speculative decoding training is disclosed and limited to internal inference optimization. Transparent approach. Terms via OpenRouter; Privacy Policy at www.wafer.ai/privacy-policy.

providers.name: Neuralwatt

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: 'We do not use your API inputs or outputs to train, fine-tune, or improve any machine learning models. Your inference data is yours.'

retention.label: 24-hour cache max
retention.detail: Prompts cached short-term (max 24 hours for multi-turn sessions). Analytics: 90 days. Billing records: account lifetime + legal.

zdr.label: Not offered
zdr.detail: No ZDR option documented. 24-hour cache is standard.

location.label: Unknown
location.detail: Data center location not disclosed. On-prem deployment via Neuralwatt Deploy available for enterprises.

providers.notes: Unique energy-based billing (kWh). No compliance certifications documented. Good policy intent with documentation gaps.

providers.name: CommandCode

training.label: Off — local-first
training.detail: 'Command Code never trains on it. Never stores it.' Code stays on user's device. Taste learning generates structured local rules, not cloud training data.

retention.label: Code local; telemetry 30 days
retention.detail: Code never stored server-side. Taste profiles and conversation history: local only. Telemetry: 30-day auto-delete.

zdr.label: Structural (local-first)
zdr.detail: ZDR is architectural — code never leaves the device. LLM API calls (Anthropic, OpenAI etc.) still go to those providers; CommandCode adds no additional storage layer.

location.label: Code local; cloud unknown
location.detail: User code stays on device. Account/telemetry cloud location not disclosed. Enterprise self-hosted option available.

providers.notes: Local-first is structurally differentiated — privacy is architectural, not just policy. No compliance certifications documented.

providers.name: Groq

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: ToS: 'We do not use your Input or Output data to train, improve, or develop our models or any other models.' Memory-only processing for inference.

retention.label: Memory only
retention.detail: Inference data processed in memory, not persisted. Account data retained per standard business practices.

zdr.label: Yes — by design
zdr.detail: ZDR is the default architecture — data is not stored post-inference. No separate ZDR agreement needed.

location.label: US
location.detail: US data centers. No EU data residency documented.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Hardware-focused inference provider (LPUs). Strong no-training commitment.

providers.name: Cohere

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: ToS: Customer data not used for training. Opt-in available for model improvement via separate agreement.

retention.label: Per agreement
retention.detail: Retention duration defined in customer agreement. Standard endpoint: not stored post-processing unless agreed.

zdr.label: Yes — via agreement
zdr.detail: ZDR available through enterprise/customer agreement. Not self-serve — requires sales engagement.

location.label: US + EU
location.detail: Headquartered in Toronto, but serves US and EU. Data residency options available for enterprise.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Canadian AI company with strong privacy stance.

providers.name: Mistral

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: ToS: Customer data not used to train models without consent. Explicit opt-in required for any training use.

retention.label: Limited period
retention.detail: Data retained only as long as necessary for service provision. Deletion upon request per GDPR.

zdr.label: Yes — GDPR by design
zdr.detail: EU company (Paris) with GDPR compliance. ZDR achievable via data deletion requests. No permanent storage of inference data.

location.label: EU (France)
location.detail: Headquartered in Paris, France. GDPR jurisdiction. Data processed in EU.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Major European open-weight model provider.

providers.name: Perplexity

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: API ToS: 'We do not use your API data to train our models.' Consumer product has different policy.

retention.label: Not stored
retention.detail: API inputs/outputs not persisted. Metadata (usage, billing) retained per standard practices.

zdr.label: Yes — by design
zdr.detail: ZDR is the default for API. No separate agreement needed — data is not stored post-inference.

location.label: US
location.detail: Headquartered in San Francisco. US data centers.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Search-focused AI with separate API product.

providers.name: Cloudflare

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: ToS: Customer content not used for training. Workers AI inference data processed ephemerally.

retention.label: Ephemeral
retention.detail: Inference data not persisted. R2 storage retention per customer configuration.

zdr.label: Yes — by design
zdr.detail: ZDR is default for Workers AI. No storage of inference data post-processing.

location.label: Global (300+ locations)
location.detail: Edge network spans 300+ cities. Data processed in region of request. No single data center dependency.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Infrastructure provider with edge inference capabilities.

providers.name: Amazon Bedrock

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: AWS treats customer data as customer data. No training on customer data without explicit consent. Governed by AWS service terms.

retention.label: Per AWS controls
retention.detail: Data retention controlled by customer via Bedrock settings. Applications can configure retention periods.

zdr.label: Yes — configurable
zdr.detail: ZDR available via Bedrock configuration. Customers can set data to not persist beyond inference.

location.label: US + Global
location.detail: AWS regions worldwide. Data processed in selected region. No cross-region transfer without configuration.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. AWS managed service for foundation models.

providers.name: Azure

training.label: Off by default
training.detail: Azure OpenAI Service: No training on customer data. Governed by Microsoft Trusted AI principles and Azure ToS.

retention.label: Limited period
retention.detail: Data retained only as long as necessary. Customer controls retention via Azure settings.

zdr.label: Yes — enterprise
zdr.detail: ZDR available for enterprise customers. Requires agreement with Microsoft. Data not persisted post-inference.

location.label: Global (35+ regions)
location.detail: Azure regions worldwide. Data residency controls available. Customer can select specific regions.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Microsoft's cloud AI inference service.

providers.name: AI21

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: ToS: Customer data not used for training without consent. Jurassic models trained on public data only.

retention.label: Not stored
retention.detail: API inputs/outputs not persisted. Processing is ephemeral.

zdr.label: Yes — by design
zdr.detail: ZDR is default architecture. No storage of inference data post-processing.

location.label: Israel + US
location.detail: Headquartered in Jerusalem. US operations. Data processed in selected regions.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Israeli AI company known for Jurassic models.

providers.name: Cerebras

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: ToS: Customer data not used for training. Inference-only service with no data retention.

retention.label: Not stored
retention.detail: Inference data processed in memory only. No persistence of prompts or completions.

zdr.label: Yes — by design
zdr.detail: ZDR is architecture default. No storage of inference data.

location.label: US
location.detail: Headquartered in Mountain View, CA. US data centers.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Hardware-focused inference (Wafer Scale Engines).

providers.name: SambaNova

training.label: Off — explicit
training.detail: ToS: Customer data not used for training. Enterprise-focused with strong privacy commitments.

retention.label: Per agreement
retention.detail: Retention duration defined in enterprise agreement. Standard: no persistence beyond inference.

zdr.label: Yes — enterprise
zdr.detail: ZDR available through enterprise agreement. Data not persisted post-inference.

location.label: US
location.detail: Headquartered in San Mateo, CA. US data centers.

providers.notes: Added via OpenRouter ToS cross-reference. Enterprise AI infrastructure provider.
